chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No.1488 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.9814/2016. 2. For final arguments 24.10.2024 Mr. Abdul Rehman Adeed, advocate for the plaintiff Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for defendant Mr. Anees Ahmed Memon, Deputy Commissioner Inland Revenue Mr. Anees Ahmed Memon, Deputy Commissioner Inland Revenue is present and states that this suit may be disposed of in the same terms as decided in Suit 401 of 2024 and other connected matters. The disposal order in the said suit reads as follows: “The respective officials are present and submit that notices impugned shall be withdrawn in view of the Judgment of the honourable Supreme Court reported as 2023 SCMR 2084, subject, however, to the right of the exchequer to issue fresh notices in accordance with law. In view hereof, respective learned counsel submit that suits appear to have achieved their purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file” In view hereof this suit is disposed of in mutatis mutandis application of the aforesaid. Judge Amjad
